allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/_DATA/600_github/foerderpilot/vorlage/foerderungen_data.json','utf8'\)\);console.log\('Anzahl:',data.length\);console.log\('Felder:',Object.keys\(data[0]\).join\(', '\)\);const cats=[...new Set\(data.map\(d=>d.kategorie\)\)].sort\(\);console.log\('Kategorien \('+cats.length+'\):\\\\n'+cats.join\('\\\\n'\)\);const zgs=[...new Set\(data.flatMap\(d=>d.zielgruppe\)\)].sort\(\);console.log\('Zielgruppen \('+zgs.length+'\):\\\\n'+zgs.join\('\\\\n'\)\);const ft=[...new Set\(data.map\(d=>d.frist_typ\)\)].sort\(\);console.log\('Fristtypen:',ft.join\(', '\)\);const noMax=data.filter\(d=>d.foerderumfang_max_chf===null\).length;console.log\('foerderumfang_max_chf=null:',noMax,'/',data.length\);const ids=data.map\(d=>d.id\);const dup=ids.filter\(\(id,i\)=>ids.indexOf\(id\)!==i\);console.log\('Doppelte IDs:',dup.length===0?'keine':dup.join\(', '\)\);")
